name: get_server_time
description: Returns the current server time in ISO 8601 format.
instruction:
Use this tool to get the current server time when asked.

[PROACTIVE USE — MANDATORY]: Whenever the user refers to a relative time period — e.g. 'last week', 'yesterday', 'this month', 'last month', 'last 7 days' — you MUST call this tool FIRST before calling any transaction or history tool. Use the returned date to calculate the correct start/end dates yourself. Do NOT ask the user to supply dates.
